name: GIGABYTE A620M C Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6400(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C - Realtek GbE LAN - 802.11ac Wi-Fi - Bluetooth 4.2
shortName: GIGABYTE A620M C Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 support and WiFi connectivity.
